title: How to Submit an IT Support Ticket
text:
Q: How do I submit an IT support ticket and what information should I include?
A: To submit an IT support ticket, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Open your web browser and navigate to the IT support portal at http://itsupport.company.com. Step 2: Click on 'Submit a Ticket' in the main menu. Step 3: Fill out the required fields, including your name, department, and a detailed description of the issue. macOS: Step 1: Open Safari or your preferred web browser and go to http://itsupport.company.com. Step 2: Select 'Submit a Ticket' from the navigation bar. Step 3: Complete the form with your name, department, and a comprehensive description of the problem. In both cases, please include any relevant error messages, the steps you took before encountering the issue, and whether it is affecting multiple users or just your device. Additionally, if applicable, attach screenshots or files that illustrate the problem. Finally, click 'Submit' to send your ticket to the IT support team. You will receive a confirmation email with your ticket number for tracking purposes.
